description: Style NoteHave a blast on the field, or when you're out on an everyday jog, with these comfortable shoes from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure, and are worth adding to your wardrobe as they're also a perfect casual option when teamed with jeans and tees.Product DetailsBlack shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingA padded tongue and innerTough rubber textured outsoleThick TPU outsole with square lugs on the sidesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
